title: Carpet Installers
description: Lay and install carpet from rolls or blocks on floors. Install padding and trim flooring materials.

tasks.text: Inspect the surface to be covered to determine its condition, and correct any imperfections that might show through carpet or cause carpet to wear unevenly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Roll out, measure, mark, and cut carpeting to size with a carpet knife, following floor sketches and allowing extra carpet for final fitting.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Join edges of carpet and seam edges where necessary, by sewing or by using tape with glue and heated carpet iron.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut and trim carpet to fit along wall edges, openings, and projections, finishing the edges with a wall trimmer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan the layout of the carpet, allowing for expected traffic patterns and placing seams for best appearance and longest wear.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Stretch carpet to align with walls and ensure a smooth surface, and press carpet in place over tack strips or use staples, tape, tacks or glue to hold carpet in place.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Take measurements and study floor sketches to calculate the area to be carpeted and the amount of material needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install carpet on some floors using adhesive, following prescribed method.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean up before and after installation, including vacuuming carpet and discarding remnant pieces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure, cut and install tackless strips along the baseboard or wall.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Nail tack strips around area to be carpeted or use old strips to attach edges of new carpet.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut carpet padding to size and install padding, following prescribed method.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fasten metal treads across door openings or where carpet meets flooring to hold carpet in place.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draw building diagrams and record dimensions.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Move furniture from area to be carpeted and remove old carpet and padding.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
